definition: a sudden event causing great damage or loss
hook: Your worst day is written in the stars.
modernAnchor: You spilled coffee on your laptop. Your project is a disaster.
journey: The word comes from the Italian disastro: dis meaning bad, and astro meaning star.
In the Renaissance, people believed catastrophic events were caused by unlucky alignments of the heavens.
Astronomers and astrologers were the same profession. The stars explained human suffering.
A disastro was the moment the cosmos turned against you. Five hundred years later, the word stuck. The astrology faded.
